basic_details.job_title: PDIL Engineers Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 153 Graduate Engineer, Diploma Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Projects & Development India Limited (PDIL), a Mini Ratna Category-I PSU, has released a recruitment notification for various Engineer posts in 2026. The organisation invites online applications from eligible candidates for Graduate Engineer and Diploma Engineer positions on a purely contract basis.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 07-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 27-07-2026

application_fee.details: For General / OBC Candidates: Rs. 800/- For SC / ST / EWS Candidates: Rs. 400/-

age_limit.details: Graduate Engineer Scale 4: Maximum 42 Years Graduate Engineer Scale 3: Maximum 37 Years Graduate Engineer Scale 2: Maximum 35 Years Graduate Engineer Scale 1: Maximum 32 Years Diploma Engineer Scale 3: Maximum 43 Years Diploma Engineer Scale 2: Maximum 40 Years Diploma Engineer Scale 1: Maximum 37 Years

selection_process: Shortlisting of Applications Personal Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official recruitment notification carefully.
Click on the online application link.
Register using a valid email ID and required details.
Fill the application form with accurate information.
Pay the application fee as applicable.
Submit the application form before the last date.
Take a printout of the application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 07-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 27-07-2026

content_sections.heading: PDIL Recruitment 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Projects & Development India Limited has announced vacancies for Graduate Engineers and Diploma Engineers in various disciplines. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for PDIL Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required educational qualification and work experience can apply for PDIL Contract Recruitment 2026. The eligibility details are as follows: Graduate Engineer Posts: Candidates should possess a relevant Engineering Degree in disciplines such as Civil, Electrical, Mechanical, Instrumentation, Computer Science, Chemical and other related fields. Diploma Engineer Posts: Candidates should possess a relevant Diploma Engineering qualification in the required discipline. Non-Technical Posts: Candidates with qualifications in HR, Management Services, Materials Management and related fields can apply for respective positions. Minimum Marks: Candidates should have minimum 60% marks in Degree/Diploma qualification (55% for SC/ST candidates). Experience: Required post-qualification experience varies from 2 years to 11 years depending on the post and scale.

content_sections.heading: PDIL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Graduate Engineer Scale 4: Maximum 42 Years Graduate Engineer Scale 3: Maximum 37 Years Graduate Engineer Scale 2: Maximum 35 Years Graduate Engineer Scale 1: Maximum 32 Years Diploma Engineer Scale 3: Maximum 43 Years Diploma Engineer Scale 2: Maximum 40 Years Diploma Engineer Scale 1: Maximum 37 Years

content_sections.heading: PDIL Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: For General / OBC Candidates: Rs. 800/- For SC / ST / EWS Candidates: Rs. 400/-

content_sections.heading: PDIL Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of Applications Personal Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for PDIL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official PDIL website. Open the Careers section. Read the official recruitment notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Register using a valid email ID and required details. Fill the application form with accurate information. Upload required documents and certificates. Pay the application fee as applicable. Submit the application form before the last date. Take a printout of the application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the full form of PDIL?
faq.answer: PDIL stands for Projects & Development India Limited.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in PDIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: PDIL Recruitment 2026 has announced a total of 153 vacancies for Graduate Engineer and Diploma Engineer posts.

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts available in PDIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts include Graduate Engineer Scale 4, Graduate Engineer Scale 3, Graduate Engineer Scale 2, Graduate Engineer Scale 1, Diploma Engineer Scale 3, Diploma Engineer Scale 2 and Diploma Engineer Scale 1.

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type of PDIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is purely on a contract basis for a period of up to three years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for PDIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an Engineering Degree, Diploma Engineering qualification or other relevant qualifications depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for PDIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies according to the post. It ranges from 32 years to 43 years depending on the scale and qualification level.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for PDIL Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration ranging from Rs. 31,000/- to Rs. 71,000/- depending on the post scale.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for PDIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General and OBC candidates have to pay Rs. 800/-, while SC, ST and EWS candidates have to pay Rs. 400/- as the application fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for PDIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of applications and a personal interview followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the last date to apply for PDIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 27 July 2026.
